title: Forms & Validation
subtitle: Template-driven forms, reactive forms, validators, and typed forms
description: Angular has two form systems: template-driven (ngModel) and reactive (FormControl/FormGroup/FormBuilder). Master both, understand typed forms (Angular 14+), and know how to write synchronous and asynchronous validators.
learningOutcomes: Compare template-driven and reactive forms and choose the right one
Build typed reactive forms with FormControl, FormGroup, and FormBuilder
Write custom synchronous validators as pure functions
Implement async validators with proper debouncing and pending state
Manage dynamic form fields with FormArray
Display validation errors using touched, dirty, and pristine states
